theme_and_archetype.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) infused with Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5)
theme_and_archetype.metaphor_and_mood: Physics and chemistry dynamics. Think molecular lattices, particle systems, orbital rings, vector fields, and oscilloscope waves. The vibe is Accenture/Infosys level scale but with the editorial, cinematic luxury of Lumina Design and The Finch. It must feel highly technical, intelligent, and premium.

typography.anti_pattern_check: Inter, Space Grotesk, Roboto, and Open Sans are strictly forbidden.

headings.style: Highly geometric, striking, bold, variable weights. Tracking MUST be tight (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

body.style: Clean, highly legible geometric sans with technical undertones.

color_system.usage_rules: Use sections to create harsh contrast. Home Hero should be Light Mode (high-key photography). The Services and Projects showcase MUST switch to Deep Obsidian Dark Mode to make the case studies pop like cinema screens.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous, luxurious padding: py-24, py-32 for sections. Containers should use max-w-7xl by default, but hero sections can break the grid.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Use 'MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID' for portfolios and case studies. Heavy asymmetry. Span rows and columns unpredictably (col-span-8, col-span-4).
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton in technical sections using Grid Borders (border-collapse, border-r, border-b with subtle border/40 colors).

motion_and_interactions.scroll: MANDATORY: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling to give the site momentum and weight.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must have a subtle scale (-translate-y-1) and an explicit color change. Buttons should feature an inner gradient shift.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Draw inspiration from physics: magnetic buttons (Framer Motion), trailing cursors with particle effects, and orbital hover states for service cards.

component_rules.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, forms) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
component_rules.buttons: Do not use standard Shadcn buttons untouched. Customize them to be cardless or completely rounded, featuring a 1px border and a subtle internal glow.
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, and Select. Apply 'Glassmorphism' (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) for the contact form.
component_rules.cards: Avoid standard cards. Use flat rectangles with sharp edges or maximum 8px radius. Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect for high-tier service highlights.
component_rules.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphic header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-black/60). MUST have a visible nav on desktop, no hamburger until mobile.
component_rules.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with Duotone weight for a premium technical look.

hero_light_abstract.description: Abstract minimalist white background with 3D molecular lattice, high key photography.
hero_light_abstract.usage: Background for the light-themed Home page Hero section.

services_dark_particles.description: Deep obsidian dark background with glowing electric orange particle system.
services_dark_particles.usage: Background for the dark-themed Services / AI capabilities section.

ai_backbone_concept.description: Geometric neural network intersecting with chemical bonds.
ai_backbone_concept.usage: Visual for the 'Approach' or 'Why Reachvel' knowledge center/about section.

project_data_analytics.description: Workspace with screens displaying market data.
project_data_analytics.usage: Projects Showcase - Data Analytics Case Study.

careers_team_1.description: Colleagues taking selfie in modern office.

structure: Hero: Light theme, full height. High-impact typography overlaying the 'hero_light_abstract' image (bg-white/40 glass overlay). Title: 'AI Powered Future Ready Solutions'.
Marquee: Client logos in grayscale, extremely slow drift.
Services Preview: Transition to DARK THEME. Use bento grid layout with 'services_dark_particles' as section background. Highlight Web, Mobile, AI.
Stats: Grid borders, giant numbers (e.g. 1M+ Lines of Code), small uppercase labels.
Projects Snippet: Kinetic hover-reveal cards linking to case studies.
Testimonials: Asymmetrical cards, editorial typography.
Hero: Split layout, large editorial typography for the mission statement.
Values: Grid-based layout showcasing 'Physics of Dynamics' in business.
Leadership/Team: Use 'careers_team_2' image. Clean, structured portrait layout.
Hero: Deep obsidian with orange accents. 'Technology-Driven Solutions for Modern Business'.
Detail Sections: Utilize the 'tracing beam' effect on service cards (Web, Mobile, AI, E-Commerce, Ad, Strategy, Data). Heavy use of icons (Phosphor) and orbital micro-interactions.
Filterable Grid: Domain filters (Fintech, Healthcare, Retail).
Showcase: Large, asymmetric bento layout. Use 'project_fintech', 'project_data_analytics', 'project_healthcare'.
Hover Interactions: Images should scale inside their containers; reveal case study narrative on hover.
Culture Section: Masonry grid of team images ('careers_team_1').
Roles List: Clean accordion or table layout for open positions.
CTA: Static UI form 'Apply Now' embedded with a glassmorphism card.
Grid: Articles layout with tags (AI, Web, Mobile).
Detail Page Layout: narrow reading column (max-w-2xl or max-w-3xl), large serif drop-caps if possible, elegant typography.
Form: Validated UI form with toast confirmation. Embedded inside a Neumorphic or Glassmorphic container.
Office Info: Clean list of addresses, email, and phone with a minimalist map aesthetic.

mobile_responsive_rules.images: All hero images and modals must have max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none.
mobile_responsive_rules.typography: Use fluid typography or strict breakpoints (text-4xl to text-6xl ceiling). Never center everything on mobile just because it's mobile; maintain left alignment for readability.
mobile_responsive_rules.navigation: Hamburger menu exclusively for mobile viewports. Full-screen overlay menu with massive text links.

dos: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for creative marketing layouts instead of rigid Shadcn section components.
Customize Shadcn forms and inputs heavily to match the brand.
Incorporate the color #FF5722 intentionally as an accent, not a dominant background.
Use data-testid on every clickable element.
donts: DO NOT use a fully transparent header over images; use backdrop-blur.
DO NOT use Inter or Space Grotesk fonts.
DO NOT use standard Bootstrap-style equal columns. Force asymmetry.
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Only use the provided asset URLs.
